svg.title: Audio Learner — icon
svg.desc: Motif: the Spanish letter "ñ" built from a sound wave — a bold rounded arch (n) topped by a wavy tilde that reads as an audio waveform. Corner badge (play triangle) marks this as the player app. Sibling of combine-icon.svg: same shapes, swapped primary/accent color and badge glyph. Full-bleed square, no transparency — iOS applies its own corner mask, so the source must stay a plain opaque square. No external fonts or images; all shapes are vector paths.
